CustomField.formula: IF( ISPICKVAL( Status , '101') , EndDate + (6/24) , IF( ISPICKVAL( Status , '108') , EndDate + (6/24), IF( ISPICKVAL( Status , '106') , EndDate + (6/24), IF( ISPICKVAL( Status , '104') , EndDate + (6/24), IF( ISPICKVAL( Status , '115') , EndDate + (6/24), IF( ISPICKVAL( Status , '114') , EndDate + (6/24), IF( ISPICKVAL( Status , '110') , EndDate + (6/24), IF( OR(ISPICKVAL(Status, '51'), ISPICKVAL(MotifARevoir__c, '10')) ,EndDate + (6/24) , IF( OR(ISPICKVAL(Status, '51'), ISPICKVAL(MotifARevoir__c, '70')) ,EndDate + (6/24) , null)))))))))
CustomField.label: DateFinReelleAnnulerVillogia
